name: bruv-shared
description: Root package only carries deps that shared/ needs to resolve. Both frontend/ and mobile/ install their own copies for runtime; this top-level entry exists so svelte-check / TypeScript can resolve imports from inside shared/*.ts without parent-walking past the repo root.

scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix mobile
scripts.// postinstall: Skips in CI (process.env.CI is set by every major CI runner). CI runs explicit npm installs in each workspace already, and chaining nested installs through postinstall causes EPERM file-lock failures on Windows when CI cleanup races the wails-build-triggered re-install.
scripts.postinstall: node -e "if (process.env.CI) { process.exit(0) } require('child_process').execSync('npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix mobile', { stdio: 'inherit' })"
